title: Union beats Kingswood in hockey
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The U13 hockey teams of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The U13 hockey teams of Union High School travelled to Makhanda recently and made a clean sweep, winning all their matches against Kingswood Junior.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The U13 hockey teams of Union High School travelled to Makhanda recently and made a clean sweep, winning all their matches against Kingswood Junior."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Every team put in a determined performance, with the U13 D side winning 1-0, the U13 C and U13 B teams both claiming convincing 4-0 victories and the U13 A team rounding off the day with a strong 3-0 win."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Union Preparatory School teams mirrored this success with a clean sweep of their own.","html":"The Union Preparatory School teams mirrored this success with a clean sweep of their own."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Schools are incredibly proud of all their players who showed good teamwork, excellent sportsmanship and complete commitment on the field, as well as good behaviour off the field.","html":"Union Schools are incredibly proud of all their players who showed good teamwork, excellent sportsmanship and complete commitment on the field, as well as good behaviour off the field."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
